prompt.content:
Redwood Components has acquired assets worth $17 million in 2024 with a useful life of 5 years, depreciating at straight-line for GAAP and double declining balance for tax. Calculate the net deferred tax roll forward value using the final tax exposure file, assuming:
- Use blended tax rate, considering state tax is deducted federally
- State apportionment factor of 85%
- Valuation allowance of 20%
Round $ amounts to the nearest whole numbers to the console

messages.content: States that 2024 net Deferred tax roll forward is $862,402 (acceptable range $853,778 to $871,026).
